design_basis: Aligned with resource-radar universal resource taxonomy; software engineering is priority, not boundary.

taxonomy.label: 00 Workspace and common entrypoints
taxonomy.description: Frequently used entrypoints for daily work and navigation.

taxonomy.label: 01 Artificial intelligence and computational intelligence
taxonomy.description: AI models, platforms, agents, evaluations, and local model tooling.

taxonomy.label: 02 Computer science, software engineering, and information systems
taxonomy.zh_label: 02_计算机科学、软件工程与信息系统
taxonomy.description: Software engineering, programming, infrastructure, systems, and engineering practice.

taxonomy.label: 03 Data, graph models, and knowledge organization
taxonomy.description: Data platforms, graphs, semantic resources, and knowledge organization.

taxonomy.label: 04 Mathematics, natural sciences, and foundational research
taxonomy.description: Mathematics, papers, science references, and foundational research.

taxonomy.label: 05 Engineering technology, hardware, and industrial systems
taxonomy.description: Hardware, electrical engineering, industrial systems, operating environments, and backup tooling.

taxonomy.label: 06 Medicine, health, and life sciences
taxonomy.description: Medicine, public health, life sciences, and evidence-based references.

taxonomy.label: 07 Agriculture, environment, and earth systems
taxonomy.description: Agriculture, climate, environment, geography, and earth systems.

taxonomy.label: 08 History, geography, and civilization studies
taxonomy.description: History, geography, maps, archives, and civilization studies.

taxonomy.label: 09 Philosophy, language, literature, and humanities
taxonomy.description: Humanities, philosophy, language, literature, and cultural references.

taxonomy.label: 10 Social sciences, economics, and organization studies
taxonomy.description: Social sciences, economics, organization studies, and public data.

taxonomy.label: 11 Art, design, architecture, media, and culture
taxonomy.description: Design, art, architecture, media, and cultural resources.

taxonomy.label: 12 Education, language learning, and lifelong development
taxonomy.description: Open courses, learning platforms, language learning, and personal development.

taxonomy.label: 13 Law, standards, public services, and compliance
taxonomy.description: Laws, standards, compliance, public services, and official references.

taxonomy.label: 14 Governance, institutions, and public policy
taxonomy.description: Government, policy, institutions, NGOs, and governance resources.

taxonomy.label: 15 Enterprises, products, industries, and technology ecosystems
taxonomy.description: Companies, products, industries, technology ecosystems, and market references.

taxonomy.label: 16 Media, sports, entertainment, and life resources
taxonomy.description: Media, sports, entertainment, life utilities, and general public resources.

taxonomy.label: 17 Methodology, cognition, and research tools
taxonomy.description: Research methods, cognition, fact-checking, systems thinking, and methodology.
